placements.subject: NVX - $45M Institutional Placement to Accelerate Battery Anode Expansion
placements.summary:
Novonix (ASX: NVX) is raising $45M via an institutional placement at $1.85 per share.
The funds will be used to fast-track construction of the Chattanooga anode facility in Tennessee.
The placement is being led by Canaccord Genuity and Bell Potter as joint lead managers.
Bookbuild closes Thursday 1 May with settlement expected by 8 May.
Strong institutional demand expected given recent US IRA battery manufacturing incentives.
Overall a positive raise that funds a clear near-term production catalyst.

placements.subject: PLS - $200M Placement to Fund Pilgangoora Expansion
placements.summary:
Pilbara Minerals (ASX: PLS) has announced a $200M institutional placement at $3.10 per share.
Proceeds will fund the P1000 expansion project at the Pilgangoora lithium-tantalum operation.
The placement represents approximately a 5.2% discount to the last closing price of $3.27.
Joint lead managers are Macquarie Capital and Goldman Sachs.
Settlement is expected on 9 May with new shares ranking equally with existing shares.
The raise strengthens the balance sheet ahead of a major capacity expansion phase.
